name: AccuKnox-Code-Analysis
description: Unified AccuKnox ASPM scanner. Run any combination of SAST, SCA, Secret, IaC, ML, API Discovery and SBOM scans and upload the results to the AccuKnox Console.
helpMarkDown: Unified AccuKnox ASPM scanner for Azure DevOps. Select one or more scans via 'Scan Types' and the task downloads the accuknox-aspm-scanner and runs each selected scan, uploading findings to the AccuKnox Console.
author: AccuKnox

inputs.name: scanType
inputs.label: Scan Types
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select one or more scans to run: SAST, SCA, Secret, IaC, ML, API Discovery, SBOM.

inputs.name: accuknoxEndpoint
inputs.label: AccuKnox API Endpoint
inputs.helpMarkDown: The URL of the AccuKnox Console to push the scan results to (e.g. cspm.demo.accuknox.com).

inputs.name: accuknoxToken
inputs.label: AccuKnox Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: The token for authenticating with the AccuKnox Console.

inputs.name: accuknoxLabel
inputs.label: AccuKnox Label
inputs.helpMarkDown: The label created in AccuKnox SaaS for associating scan results.

inputs.name: scannerVersion
inputs.label: Scanner Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Git tag of the accuknox-aspm-scanner binary to download (must include the sca, ml and api-discovery scanners).

inputs.name: softFail
inputs.label: Soft Fail
inputs.helpMarkDown: Do not return a non-zero exit code if a scan finds issues (applies to all selected scans).

inputs.name: sastCommand
inputs.label: SAST Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Command text passed to --command (the directory/target to scan).

inputs.name: sastSeverity
inputs.label: SAST Severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated severities (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).

inputs.name: scaCommand
inputs.label: SCA Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Command text passed to --command (e.g. 'fs .').

inputs.name: scaSeverity
inputs.label: SCA Severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated severities to fail on (UNKNOWN, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).

inputs.name: secretCommand
inputs.label: Secret Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Command text passed to --command (e.g. 'git file://.' or 'filesystem .').

inputs.name: secretAdditionalArguments
inputs.label: Secret Additional Arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Extra arguments appended to the secret command (e.g. --results verified --branch main).

inputs.name: iacCommand
inputs.label: IaC Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Raw command text passed to --command. When set, overrides the structured IaC inputs below.

inputs.name: iacDirectory
inputs.label: IaC Directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory with infrastructure code to scan.

inputs.name: iacFile
inputs.label: IaC File
inputs.helpMarkDown: Specific file to scan; cannot be used together with IaC Directory.

inputs.name: iacFramework
inputs.label: IaC Framework
inputs.helpMarkDown: Restrict scan to specific framework(s), e.g. Kubernetes, Terraform, terraform_plan (comma-separated for multiple).

inputs.name: iacCompact
inputs.label: IaC Compact
inputs.helpMarkDown: Do not display code blocks in the output.

inputs.name: iacQuiet
inputs.label: IaC Quiet
inputs.helpMarkDown: Display only failed checks.

inputs.name: mlCommand
inputs.label: ML Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Command text passed to --command (e.g. 'scan -p . -r json').

inputs.name: mlModelName
inputs.label: ML Model Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Custom collector/model identifier (optional).

inputs.name: mlSourceType
inputs.label: ML Source Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Source type for metadata.

inputs.name: apiCommand
inputs.label: API Discovery Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Command text passed to --command (e.g. '-path . -output results.json').

inputs.name: sbomScanType
inputs.label: SBOM Target Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: Target type: 'image' or 'filesystem'.

inputs.name: sbomImageRef
inputs.label: SBOM Image Reference
inputs.helpMarkDown: Full registry image reference to scan (required when SBOM Target Type is image).

inputs.name: sbomScanPath
inputs.label: SBOM Scan Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Filesystem path to scan (used when SBOM Target Type is filesystem).

inputs.name: sbomCommand
inputs.label: SBOM Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: Raw command text passed to --command. When set, overrides the structured SBOM inputs above.

inputs.name: sbomSeverity
inputs.label: SBOM Severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comma-separated severities (UNKNOWN, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).

inputs.name: sbomProjectName
inputs.label: SBOM Project Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Project name (AccuKnox entity). Required when SBOM is selected.
